name: Race or Crash: Secret Racer League
short_description: Race or Crash is a Combat-Racing game, where you can smash into your enemies drivin' your musclecar! You also can choose manual or automatic gear switching! Some nonsense happens here & you need to find out what's goin' on on this goddamn mountain! C'mon, dude!!!
detailed_description:
Break through your rivals and destroy their cars to reach the finish line first! But it's not that simple! In this place, people are telling some strange things… You have to find out what the hell they are talkin' about!

The local racers tell tales that there is somebody besides you all on this mountain. This' pretty bizarre since there are no signs of anybody's presence! Don't be naïve: win in all the races and find out who that secret person is! You are a racer after all!

In order to impress your rivals by your amazing car, you can choose 1 of the 3 kinds of vinyls almost for every car! You should never forget about your own uniqueness!

You also can join the professionals' club by choosing the manual transmission mode!

That's exactly what I'm talking about - being an example of a great driver! I'm sure you'll get what you want! FORWARD, MY FRIEND!!!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Russian, Czech, Tatar, Danish, Finnish, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish, Ukrainian, Kazakh
